scripts.test: pnpm --filter @orders/api-mock test && pnpm --filter @orders/shared test && pnpm --filter @orders/mobile-rn test && pnpm --filter @orders/web test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @orders/shared test:coverage:check && pnpm --filter @orders/web test:coverage:check && pnpm --filter @orders/mobile-rn test:coverage:check
